taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Software Engineering, Production-grade Software Development, Python, TypeScript, JavaScript
skill_match_scores: Software Engineering:1.0, Production-grade Software Development:0.5, Python:1.0, TypeScript:1.0, JavaScript:0.5
must_have_quals: 4+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a track record of shipping production-grade software in fast-paced or ambiguous environments, Comfortable operating independently, making decisions with incomplete information, and driving outcomes without close oversight, Strong problem-solving skills and comfort navigating complex systems, debugging issues in real time, and owning features end-to-end, Proficiency in Python and/or TypeScript/JavaScript, Strong communication and relationship-building skills – able to earn trust with scientists, executives, and engineering teams, Willingness to learn new scientific domains quickly and adapt to rapidly evolving priorities
preferred_quals: Experience in life sciences, pharma, biotech, or scientific R&D – either as a researcher, consultant, or engineer working in these environments, Experience working with AI/ML systems, LLM-powered applications, or agent architectures, Background as a technical founder, forward-deployed engineer, or management consultant, A science degree or research experience alongside your engineering skills
core_responsibilities: Be embedded at a client site, understand their research workflows deeply, and take responsibility for maximizing the value Edison delivers to that organization, Map the customer's scientific and operational landscape to identify where AI agents can have the most impact – not just where they ask for help, but where the real leverage is, Design, implement, and iterate on production-ready integrations in fast cycles, often owning features end-to-end from architecture to rollout, Troubleshoot issues in real time, ensure reliability and adoption, and be the go-to technical contact for AI within the client organization, Capture pain points, unmet needs, and product gaps and work with our internal Applied AI and engineering teams to shape future capabilities
job_summary: Edison Scientific is focused on building and commercializing AI agents for scientific discovery. As a Forward Deployed Engineer, you will work closely with leading science R&D organizations to maximize the value of Edison's AI agents by understanding their workflows and pain points, and delivering solutions rapidly.
